---
title: "EDA: Distributions"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
# Load packages and data
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))
predictors <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
baseline_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_baseline.rds"))
lastvisit_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lastvisit.rds"))
all_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_longitudinal.rds"))
```


# Predictor distributions
```{r predictor-dist}
# Categorical
apoe_hist <- predictors %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = apoe)) +
  geom_bar(stat="count", fill="steelblue", alpha=0.7) + 
  labs(title = "APOE Status", 
       x = "APOE Status",
       y = "Count")

fhx_hist <- predictors %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = family_history)) +
  geom_bar(stat="count", fill="steelblue", alpha=0.7) + 
  labs(title = "Family History", 
       x = "Family History",
       y = "Count")

cat_hist <- apoe_hist | fhx_hist
cat_hist <- cat_hist + plot_annotation(title = "PREVENT-AD Categorical Predictors")
cat_hist

# Continuous
cogd_plot <- predictors %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_cogd)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth=2, fill="steelblue", alpha=0.7) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "CogDrisk Scores",
       x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "Density")

libra2_plot <- predictors %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_libra2)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth=2, fill="steelblue", alpha=0.7) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "LIBRA2 Scores",
       x = "LIBRA2 Score",
       y = "Density")

grs_plot <- predictors %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GRS)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins=20, fill="steelblue", alpha=0.7) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "Genetic Risk Scores",
       subtitle = "(GRS)",
       x = "GRS",
       y = "Density")

cont_plot <- cogd_plot | libra2_plot | grs_plot
cont_plot <- cont_plot + plot_annotation(title = "PREVENT-AD Continuous Predictors")
cont_plot

# Save plots
# ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_predictors_categorical_hist.png"), cat_hist, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_predictors_continuous_hist.png"), cont_plot, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```


# Biomarker distributions 
```{r biomarker-dist}
biomarkers_longer <- all_dat %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Visit_label, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  )

biomarker_plot <- biomarkers_longer %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=measure)) +
  geom_density() +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") +
  labs(title = "Biomarker Distributions",
       x = "Biomarker Level",
       y = "Density")

biomarker_plot

biomarkers_transform_longer <- all_dat %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Visit_label, all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  )

biomarker_transformed_plot <- biomarkers_transform_longer %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=measure)) +
  geom_density() +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free")

biomarker_transformed_plot
```


# Biomarker QQ plot
```{r biomarker-qq}
ggplot(biomarkers_longer, aes(sample = measure)) +
    stat_qq(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = "Q-Q Plot",
         x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )

ggplot(biomarkers_transform_longer, aes(sample = measure)) +
    stat_qq(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = "Q-Q Plot (Transformed)",
         x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )
```
